allow: Bash(sqlcmd -S "." -d WarehouseDB -Q "SELECT type_id, type_code, type_name FROM lkp_transaction_types ORDER BY type_id")

Bash(sqlcmd -S "." -d WarehouseDB -Q "SELECT TOP 1 id, so_number, warehouse_id, status_id FROM sales_orders")
Bash(sqlcmd -S "." -d WarehouseDB -Q "SELECT TOP 1 id, po_number, warehouse_id, status_id FROM purchase_orders")
